/usr/bin/clang -O2 -DNDEBUG -std=c2y -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Werror -Wconversion -Wsign-conversion -Wshadow -Wundef -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wmissing-declarations -Wold-style-definition -Wdouble-promotion -Wfloat-equal -Wformat=2 -Wformat-security -Wnull-dereference -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wswitch-enum -Wswitch-default -Wunreachable-code -Wvla -Wpointer-arith -Wredundant-decls -Wbad-function-cast -Wnested-externs -Wunused-macros -Wuninitialized -Winit-self -Wdocumentation -fstrict-flex-arrays=3 -fstack-protector-strong -fno-common -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_input.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_input.dir/src/test_input.c.o -o test_input  libtty.a /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 -lfreetype -lharfbuzz -lGL -lm
